what_it_does: Official Python client for Tripo 3D API, including text/image/multiview generation, mesh editing, conversion, rigging, and retargeting APIs.
succinct_summary: High Morgan relevance as the direct programmable interface to Tripo avatar generation and processing.
possible_use: Build automated Morgan avatar generation jobs, asset conversion, rigging calls, or retargeting pipelines.
important_notes: Requires Tripo API key; inspect SDK method coverage before wiring production scripts.
